question: प्रत्येक राज्याचे नाव आणि त्याशी संबंधित स्थान आयडींची संख्या, राज्याच्या नावानुसार गट करून आणि सर्वाधिक ते सर्वात कमी संख्येनुसार क्रमवारीत सूचीबद्ध करा.

SELECT 
    state.state_name, 
    COUNT(location.location_id) AS location_count
FROM 
    dim_state state
JOIN 
    dim_district district ON state.state_id = district.state_id
JOIN 
    dim_location location ON district.district_id = location.district_id
GROUP BY 
    state.state_name
ORDER BY 
    location_count DESC;
raw_output:

    state.state_name, 
    COUNT(location.location_id) AS location_count
FROM 
    dim_state state
JOIN 
    dim_district district ON state.state_id = district.state_id

    dim_location location ON district.district_id = location.district_id

    state.state_name
